intro_cards.title: Sequential Action: てから
intro_cards.body:
てから means 'after doing ~' — one action is completed before the next.

Pattern: [verb て-form] + から + [next action]

• 手を洗ってから食べます。
(I will eat after washing my hands.)
• 宿題をしてから遊びます。
(I will play after doing homework.)

前に vs てから:
• 食べる前に手を洗う (wash hands BEFORE eating)
• 手を洗ってから食べる (eat AFTER washing hands)

Note: The action after てから must come second in real time.
